## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan use cases for Datagrid's agentic AI platform, focusing on programmatic SEO and image classification for marketing applications.](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Datagrid seeks use cases outside construction industry to broaden appeal](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop a programmatic SEO image classification use case with Adventures Group](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Webinar planned for March 20th to showcase Datagrid's capabilities and GrowthX's integration](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [API integration allows for seamless workflow incorporation of Datagrid's agent technology](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

## Topics

### Datagrid's Agentic AI Capabilities

  - [Demonstrated ability to process and analyze large datasets (e.g., conference planning, customer visits)](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Can perform complex tasks like image classification, content analysis, and data enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [API allows for integration into existing workflows and systems](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

### Use Case Development

  - [Focus on programmatic SEO and image classification for marketing applications](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
  - [Adventures Group identified as potential showcase client (travel/hospitality industry)](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Use case to involve classifying and enriching image database, then using AI to select appropriate images for content](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

### Webinar Planning

  - [Scheduled for March 20th (Thursday morning)](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Will feature both Datagrid's platform capabilities and GrowthX's API integration](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2590.0)
  - [Aim to attract marketers, content creators, and SEO professionals](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)

### Competitive Positioning

  - [Positioning against competitors like AirOps, highlighting Datagrid's superior agentic AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
  - [Emphasis on cross-industry applications and API integration flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2179.0)

### Additional Use Cases Discussed

  - [Construction site safety analysis through image processing](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Upwork productivity tracking and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2864.0)
  - [Potential for SaaS applications leveraging Datagrid's technology](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to confirm image storage location for Adventures Group (likely Google Drive)](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=3132.0)
  - [Develop and test the programmatic SEO image classification use case with Adventures Group data](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Prepare webinar content and promotion strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2815.0)
  - [Jimmy to lead webinar preparation and potentially organize paid promotion on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [Explore additional use cases and potential clients outside the construction industry](https://fathom.video/share/s6V23GufmE9Xbc7_D78APhxsTni-iYem?tab=summary&timestamp=2179.0)
